title: Sabco - Tissue Paper 100 Sheets, Gift Wrap, Mg and Acid Free, 20 X 30" Size, Wrapping Decorative Sketch and Cutting Paper for Art Craft & Packing. – Cerise/Pink
features: COLORFUL VARIETY: These 100 Sheets Of High Quality Tissue Paper Are Available In 20 Vibrant & Bright Colours. Ideal For Kids Arts And Crafts, To Packaging, Moving, Xmas, Easter, And Valentines Day Supplies.
ACID FREE PAPER: Premium Quality Machine Glazed Acid Free Tissue Paper Sheets With A Slight Shine On One Side. This Tissue Paper Is Thicker And Better Quality Than Many Competitors Can Offer.

CASES AND FILLINGS - Can Be Used As A Filling Material For Packing Parcels And Boxes, Gift Bags, Cartons, Or As A Protective Layer For Jewellery, Etc. The Bright Colour Options And Premium Quality Make Them Ideal For Arts And Crats Or Packing Gifts For Anyone, Any Time Of The Year.

ALL-ROUNDER - For Making Pompoms, Paper Flowers, Table Decorations, Drawing, Sketching, Transferring Patterns. Thicker Quality Makes More Enjoyable When Using For Arts And Crafts As It Will Not Just Soak And Tear. These Tissue Papers Are Rather Strong When Wet Too.
SIZE: 500mm X 750mm = 20" X 30", Please Note: Image Is For Illustration Purposes Only. Colour May Vary When Viewing From Different Screens/Monitors

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Arts and crafts, gift wrapping, moving or packing, sketching or drawing
